roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: APD 3455PC MOT/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC 3455/PD/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/ORMS//X: NO WEAPONS AS A CONDITON OF RELEASE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//CONT: TS APD 3455PC,TRAILING #21007798/DAWF/
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOTION/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 11/TRANS 11:AT 130PM FOR ARRAIGNMENT ON APD 3455PC AND JOIN 21007798/
/CAL:TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS, TRAILING #21007798/
/DAWT/CAL:TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS, TRAILING #21007798/CONT/DOPC/
